text: Planning a trip is always an exciting part of travel. Before you go, you research destinations, book flights, and plan your itinerary. Once you arrive, you experience new cultures—different customs, music, and ways of life. Trying local food is a highlight, from street stalls to family-run restaurants. However, language barriers can be challenging; a simple phrase like “hello” or “thank you” helps a lot. Despite the difficulties, these trips create lasting memories—the laughter, the unexpected moments, and the people you meet. Each journey leaves you with stories that stay with you long after you return home.
